name: elizaos-plugin-bitrouter
description: elizaOS LLM provider plugin that routes model calls through BitRouter.

BITROUTER_API_KEY.description: BitRouter virtual API key (brvk_...). Optional when BitRouter runs with skip_auth on localhost.

BITROUTER_SMALL_MODEL.description: Model string for the SMALL tier (default gpt-4o-mini). Bare name uses BitRouter auto-cascade; provider:model pins a specific upstream.

BITROUTER_LARGE_MODEL.description: Model string for the LARGE tier (default gpt-4o).

BITROUTER_NANO_MODEL.description: Model string for the NANO tier (defaults to SMALL).

BITROUTER_MEDIUM_MODEL.description: Model string for the MEDIUM tier (defaults to SMALL).

BITROUTER_MEGA_MODEL.description: Model string for the MEGA tier (defaults to LARGE).

BITROUTER_RESPONSE_HANDLER_MODEL.description: Model string for the RESPONSE_HANDLER tier (defaults to LARGE).

BITROUTER_ACTION_PLANNER_MODEL.description: Model string for the ACTION_PLANNER tier (defaults to LARGE).

BITROUTER_PRIORITY.description: Integer priority for this provider registration (default 0). Raise to outrank other model providers.
